sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19365" key="ba/rhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βάρ-ημα</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βᾰ],<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">το</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n19365.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">burden, load,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> D H.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4099.tlg001:10:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
